name: utibes-plugins-marketplace
description: Custom plugins for autonomous development, code review, infrastructure provisioning, and QA verification

plugins.name: blog-fact-checker
plugins.description: Verify blog posts and articles sentence by sentence, outputting a comprehensive verification table with source links and accuracy ratings

plugins.name: example-plugin
plugins.description: An example plugin demonstrating the standard plugin structure for this marketplace

plugins.name: infra-dev
plugins.description: Autonomous infrastructure provisioning from JIRA tickets. Writes Terraform configuration for AWS and PagerDuty resources, runs terraform plan/apply with user approval, validates resources via AWS CLI and provider APIs, captures validation screenshots, and creates PRs with proof of provisioning.

plugins.name: manual-verify
plugins.description: Black-box manual QA verification via Playwright. Launches a browser, navigates the UI using context from JIRA tickets and Langfuse documentation, executes validation steps, captures video and screenshot evidence, and returns structured pass/fail results.

plugins.name: pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR code review with JIRA context. Fetches JIRA ticket and follows linked documents (PRDs, GitHub markdown, Confluence) up to configurable depth, reviews tests for coverage and black-box philosophy, runs tests locally (skips if CI passed), verifies implementation matches ticket requirements, and reviews code across 8 dimensions.

plugins.name: rfc-to-jira
plugins.description: Convert RFC spec documents into structured JIRA tickets that Claude can implement end-to-end, with built-in validation loops (unit tests, integration tests, local manual testing)

plugins.name: swe-dev
plugins.description: Autonomous development from JIRA tickets. Fetches tickets (single ticket or full epic), builds a dependency graph, parallelizes implementation across git worktrees, runs TDD loops, validates locally, and creates one PR per ticket.
